'''Vak Somoril''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], he was assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']]. During this tour, a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] killed ISB [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Drelfin]] after he confronted them for refusing to kill civilians on [[Teardrop]].

Somoril attempted to track them down, but was alarmed when [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] demanded ''Reprisal''{{'s}} assistance. Assuming she was after the deserters and that he would be held responsible, Somoril attempted to deceive her, not realizing that her mission had nothing to do with the deserters. Somoril, in cooperation with ''Reprisal''{{'s}} [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]], would later assign a pair of ISB stormtroopers to assist Jade in her infiltration of a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group. Only later did he realize that her mission had nothing to do with him.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
